title: Searchable LoRA tree picker
description: New MpiLoraPicker primitive: trigger opens a portalled box with a search box + collapsible file-system folder tree built from state.availableLoras paths. Replaces MpiDropdown at both LoRA-slot mount sites in MpiModelSettings (flat + staged) for all model types; value stays the full path string so heal/missing/inject logic is untouched. Other 5 MpiDropdown consumers unchanged.
